rootCause: Legacy engine used a single-recruiter effective pool (stored roster only had Taylor) and global tie-breaking favored the lowest-workload recruiter globally, collapsing 100% of assignments to Taylor. Fixed engine uses DM-aligned territory recruiter pools and deterministic tie-breaks within each territory.

topManualReviewReasons.reason: Low operational fit and advancement confidence — manual review before assignment.
